verification_gate: Red tests fail first for: Spec reviewed and ratified; Referenced by all lane indexes; Versioned in repo; green only when all pass with a recorded proof record.

proof_summary: ARCHBP-064 is complete: the isolation architecture spec is finalized and published at planning-spine-v0/docs/isolation-architecture-spec.md as version 1.0.0, status ratified, with the 2026-07-22 reconciliation as its recorded review basis; it anchors to the RuVector blueprint and the owner-stated brief, is referenced by all ten yzx-iso lane indexes (backlinks committed in GitKB), and is versioned in the repository together with the invariant ledger, tier map, and failure-mode catalog — a stable authority for T2-T10.
